sources.quote: Cardiac rehabilitation (rehab) is a medically supervised program to help people who have had a heart attack, heart failure, heart valve surgery, coronary artery bypass grafting, or percutaneous coronary intervention. The program includes exercise training, education on heart-healthy living, and counseling to reduce stress.

Structured data is a standardized format for providing information about a page and classifying the page content. Schema.org provides a shared vocabulary, and Google uses concrete subtypes — not abstract parent classes — when interpreting markup.
